bead.title: openrouter health gate: credential_missing/credential_invalid when api_key is unset or a literal env placeholder
bead.description:
Second of three sub-beads for parent fizeau-0bc93861. Wires openrouter credential gating into service_routing.go using the engine plumbing landed in fizeau-458f10b0. No network — purely a string/env check. The bug surfaces when api_key in fizeau config is the literal string '${OPENROUTER_API_KEY}' because the env var was not set during config load (see internal/config/config_test.go:258-266 which shows the literal string is preserved verbatim). Currently this bypasses ConfigError, the provider survives routing-input construction, openrouter is picked, and the dispatch fails with HTTP 401. This bead makes that case appear in routing_decision as eligible=false + filter_reason=credential_missing without burning a dispatch.

Scope:
- Detect 'no usable key': empty, contains the literal substring '${' (failed env expansion), or otherwise zero-length after TrimSpace. Mark the provider in ProviderEligibilityOverrides with credential_missing.
- Do not introduce any HTTP call. No probe state.
- Does not handle remote-derived states (credit_exhausted, credential_invalid, provider_unreachable) — those land in fizeau-XXC.

Depends on fizeau-458f10b0.
bead.acceptance:
1. With openrouter provider configured with api_key='${OPENROUTER_API_KEY}' and the env var unset, routing_decision exposes the openrouter candidate(s) with eligible=false and FilterReason=credential_missing and no HTTP request is issued to openrouter.ai. Verified by an integration test in service_*_test.go (package fizeau) that uses fakeServiceConfig with api_key='' (or the unexpanded placeholder) and asserts the candidates payload after running Execute (or ResolveRoute, whichever exposes Candidates) with no model pin.
2. With api_key set to a non-empty, non-placeholder value the gate is silent: candidate appears with eligible=true (still subject to other gates). Verified by a separate test case in the same file.
3. cd /Users/erik/Projects/fizeau && go test ./... green.
4. No regression in service_adr005_test.go or service_routing_test.go.
